description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical ceramic vase with a slightly irregular, hand-crafted form and a glossy white glaze. The surface is adorned with a pattern of soft yellow daisy-like flowers on one side and gray polka dots on the other, giving it a whimsical, decorative appearance. Three rounded handles are evenly spaced around the upper rim, each smoothly integrated into the body, allowing for easy lifting or hanging. The mouth of the vase is wide and open, with a dark, hollow interior visible from above. The glaze finish is smooth and reflective, enhancing the vibrancy of the floral and dotted motifs. The vase appears well-preserved, with no visible cracks or chips, and would serve as a charming accent in a public or private urban setting.
description: A glossy, hand-crafted ceramic vase with three handles, decorated with yellow floral motifs and gray polka dots on a white background.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from above, highlighting the open mouth, one prominent handle, and the daisy floral pattern on the front.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the three handles and the side covered in gray polka dots, with minimal floral decoration visible.
description_view_2: The back of the vase is shown, featuring two handles and a mostly polka-dotted surface with faint floral patterns.
description_view_3: The side with the densest cluster of yellow daisy flowers is visible, along with two handles and the vase's cylindrical shape.
